signSucceed.registerContent: Your account has been registered successfully, and we have automatically logged you into TalexTouch.
signSucceed.loginContent: Your account has been logged in successfully, and you can now start enjoying TalexTouch.

emailVerify.title: Verify Email
emailVerify.content: We have sent a verification email to your mailbox, please enter the email verification code.

account.remoteFail: Unable to connect to the remote server!

themePreference.pure: Use a solid background layer to fully block window material effects.
themePreference.refraction: Let the system material refract through for a stronger glass-like feeling.
themePreference.filter: Apply an extra filtered layer on top of refraction for softer transitions.

settingHeader.subTitle: The command bar, reimagined for those who build.

settingAbout.dashboardDesc: Enable system details page to display indexing, applications, logs and OCR status.
settingAbout.searchEngineLogsDesc: Enable detailed logging for search engine operations to help debug search issues.
settingAbout.startupHealthUnknownDesc: No startup metrics are available yet. Refresh later or export performance data for diagnosis.
settingAbout.developerModeDesc: Show internal plugins and advanced options (use with care)
settingAbout.advancedSettingsDesc: Show file indexing, app index scheduling, download, analytics, and storage settings
settingAbout.systemInfoPlaceholder: System information is only available in development mode

settingLanguage.groupDesc: Select your preferred language for the application.
settingLanguage.followSystemDesc: Automatically match the system language setting.
settingLanguage.chooseLanguageDesc: Manually select your preferred display language.

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.description: Create an account or sign in to unlock full capabilities, sync data across devices, and access cloud services.

offline.title: Continue Offline
offline.description: You can continue without signing in, but cross-device sync and cloud features will be unavailable.

done.description: You're all set. Let's get started.

shortcut.changeInSettings: You can change this shortcut in Settings

forbidden.description: We're sorry, but we're unable to provide service at this time.

guided.title: Guided Tour
guided.description: I'm new to this app and want a comprehensive walkthrough of its core features.

selfGuided.title: Self-Guided
selfGuided.description: I'm familiar with similar apps and prefer exploring the interface at my own pace.

settingSentry.title: Nexus Analytics
settingSentry.groupDesc: Enabled by default and can be turned off manually; helps improve the app experience and product decisions
settingSentry.enableDesc: Upload sanitized performance and error metrics to help diagnose issues faster. Turning this off stops new upload queue writes.
settingSentry.uploadTooltip: Enabled by default. Only sanitized metrics are uploaded; raw search text, file paths, clipboard content, emails, secrets, prompts, and response bodies are never uploaded. Signed-in users are associated by user ID; anonymous mode disables that association but does not control the upload switch.
settingSentry.anonymousDesc: Do not associate the user ID; only keep necessary sanitized metrics.
settingSentry.anonymousLoginRequired: Sign in to change anonymous mode.
settingSentry.refreshStatsDesc: Fetch the latest state from the local database
settingSentry.warning: When anonymous mode is off, signed-in users are associated by user ID. Emails, raw search text, file paths, clipboard content, and secrets are still never uploaded.
settingSentry.privacyManagementDesc: Manage your privacy settings and data on the website
settingSentry.dashboardDesc: View detailed usage stats and trends in Nexus

settingTools.groupDesc: Practical tools provide a unified fast desktop arbitrary promoter for you to use.
settingTools.customPlaceholderDesc: Customize the CoreBox input placeholder text. Leave empty for default.
settingTools.usageDesc: Guide you to use app when enter.
settingTools.shortcutsDesc: Manage system-wide shortcut settings in one place.
settingTools.omniPanelShortcutDesc: Enable Command/Ctrl + Shift + P to open OmniPanel.
settingTools.omniPanelMouseLongPressDesc: Enable long-press right click to open OmniPanel and capture selected text.
settingTools.omniPanelMouseLongPressDurationDesc: Set the hold threshold used to trigger OmniPanel.

shortcutStatus.unavailable: Shortcut registration failed; possibly reserved by the system
shortcutStatus.omniPanelAccessibilityHint: Grant macOS Accessibility permission before the mouse trigger can work.
shortcutStatus.spotlightHint: Disable Spotlight shortcut in macOS settings to free this combo

settingTools.autoPasteDesc: Auto-fill fresh clipboard content when CoreBox is opened after copying.
settingTools.autoClearDesc: Reset CoreBox on next open after it has been hidden for the selected time. Reopening shortly keeps the current state.
settingTools.clipboardPollingIntervalDesc: How often clipboard is checked while idle. Higher frequency uses more power. When CoreBox is visible, polling is boosted to 0.5s.
settingTools.clipboardPollingLowBatteryDesc: Automatically reduce clipboard polling frequency on battery power to save energy.
settingTools.clipboardPollingLowBatteryIntervalDesc: Clipboard polling interval used on battery when the low-battery policy is enabled.
settingTools.recommendationEnabledDesc: Enable smart recommendations based on your usage patterns.
settingTools.recommendationShowReasonDesc: Display the reason for each recommendation.
settingTools.recommendationMaxItemsDesc: Maximum number of recommended items to show in search bar.
settingTools.recommendationSemanticLocalVectorDesc: Compute a lightweight semantic score from local context features without calling AI services.
settingTools.recommendationSemanticAiRerankDesc: Use a configured AI provider to rerank a small candidate set; failures and timeouts fall back to local ranking.
settingTools.recommendationSemanticAiEmbeddingDesc: Use embedding capability to improve semantic similarity for a small candidate set. Off by default.
settingTools.recommendationContextTimeDesc: Use local time slots to rank recommendations without sending data out.
settingTools.recommendationContextForegroundAppDesc: Prefer actions related to the app you are currently using.
settingTools.recommendationContextClipboardDesc: Use clipboard type and lightweight content hints for local recommendations.
settingTools.recommendationContextNetworkDesc: Adjust recommendations when the device appears offline or on a specific network type.
settingTools.recommendationContextBluetoothDesc: Use local Bluetooth availability as a lightweight device context signal.
settingTools.recommendationContextFocusDesc: Prefer work-oriented actions when system focus or do-not-disturb is active.
settingTools.recommendationContextPowerDesc: Reduce power-heavy recommendations when the device is on battery.
settingTools.recommendationContextLocationDesc: Use a hashed local timezone and network bucket instead of raw location data.

settingAssistant.groupDesc: Enable a desktop floating entry that sends text commands to CoreBox.
settingAssistant.enableAssistantDesc: Assistant entries such as the floating ball and voice panel only respond when this is enabled. It stays off by default.
settingAssistant.floatingBallDesc: Show a draggable desktop entry. Click it to open the text command panel.
settingAssistant.assistantNameDesc: Name shown at the top of the Assistant panel.
settingAssistant.voiceWakeDesc: When enabled, the floating ball and panel may request speech recognition. When disabled, only text input is used.
settingAssistant.wakeWordsDesc: Separate multiple wake words with commas.

read.name: Read App Language
read.desc: Read the current app language and resolve localized plugin text

read.name: Read Domain Lexicon
read.desc: Search and resolve official and plugin-scoped terminology

register.name: Register Domain Lexicon
register.desc: Register bounded terminology inside this plugin's isolated namespace

settingUser.groupDesc: Manage your account information and login status.
settingUser.loginBrowserPendingDesc: Complete authorization in the browser. Reopen it if the page did not open or was closed. {seconds}s remaining.
settingUser.loginDialogPreparingDesc: Connecting to Tuff Nexus and preparing to open your browser for secure authorization.
settingUser.loginDialogWaitingDesc: The authorization page has been opened. Reopen it if the page did not open or was closed. {seconds}s remaining.
settingUser.loginDialogManualHint: If the system browser did not open, copy the sign-in link into your browser to complete authorization.
settingUser.loginDialogManualHintWithCode: If the system browser did not open, copy the sign-in link into your browser to complete authorization. Code: {code}.
settingUser.loginDialogBrowserOpenFailed: The system browser did not open automatically, but the sign-in session is still waiting. Copy the sign-in link into your browser to continue.
settingUser.loginDialogBrowserOpenFailedWithCode: The system browser did not open automatically, but the sign-in session is still waiting. Copy the sign-in link into your browser to continue. Code: {code}.
settingUser.loginDialogFailedDesc: Unable to complete account authorization. Please try again.
settingUser.stepUpPrompt: Complete secondary verification in your browser.
settingUser.browserOpenManualToast: The browser did not open automatically. Copy the sign-in link to continue.

syncDescriptions.autoEnabled: Enabled by default after sign-in; you can turn it off here.
syncDescriptions.userDisabled: You turned sync off; it will not automatically resume after sign-in.

secureStorage.disabledDescription: Enable login credential protection for stronger local credential protection and safer sign-in.
secureStorage.checkingDescription: Checking the local credential protection backend.
secureStorage.unavailableDescription: Local credential protection is unavailable. When available, enabling it gives stronger protection and safer sign-in.
secureStorage.enabledDescription: Login credential protection is enabled: credentials are encrypted with this device's root key for stronger protection.
secureStorage.sessionModeReminder: Login credential protection is off. Enable it in Account settings for stronger local credential protection.

authErrors.initializationFailed: Authentication could not initialize. Check your connection and try again.
authErrors.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your connection and try again.
authErrors.signUpFailed: Sign-up failed. Check your connection and try again.
authErrors.loginTimeout: The sign-in session timed out. Reopen the browser sign-in page and try again.
authErrors.browserOpenFailed: The system browser did not open. Copy the sign-in link manually and continue authorization.
authErrors.networkError: Network connection failed. Check your connection or proxy settings.
authErrors.authCallbackFailed: The authorization callback is invalid. Reopen the sign-in page and try again.
authErrors.deviceNotAuthorized: This device needs authorization. Complete the security verification in your browser.
authErrors.rateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.
authErrors.quotaExceeded: Your account quota is not available. Check your Nexus account status.
authErrors.permissionDenied: This account does not have permission for this action. Check account access.
authErrors.sessionExpired: The sign-in session expired. Sign in again.
authErrors.serverUnavailable: Tuff Nexus is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
authErrors.unknownError: Unknown authentication error. Please try again.

creditsSummary.title: AI Credits
creditsSummary.description: View personal remaining, used, and quota for Nexus AI credits.
creditsSummary.notice: Nexus official provider calls consume this quota by the totalTokens returned by the model.
creditsSummary.loginRequired: Sign in to view remaining credits and usage.
creditsSummary.loginDescription: Sign in to your Tuff account to read the Nexus credits summary.

userProfile.title: Account
userProfile.authRequired: Sign in to view account details
userProfile.emailManageHint: Email updates are managed in browser account settings.
userProfile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about you
userProfile.loginMethodsLocal: Login methods are unavailable in local mode

themeStyle.materialDetailDesc: Choose a window material and apply it to the main interface immediately.
themeStyle.micaTip: Mica style may impact device performance.
themeStyle.homepageWallpaperDesc: Choose the homepage wallpaper source. Auto uses the desktop wallpaper first, then falls back to Bing.
themeStyle.autoWallpaperDesktopReady: Auto mode has loaded the desktop wallpaper.
themeStyle.autoWallpaperBingFallback: Auto mode tries the desktop wallpaper first and falls back to Bing if unavailable.
themeStyle.desktopWallpaperReady: Current desktop wallpaper has been loaded.
themeStyle.desktopWallpaperPending: Desktop wallpaper has not been loaded yet. Refresh manually if needed.
themeStyle.desktopWallpaperUnavailable: Desktop wallpaper is unavailable on this system.
themeStyle.copyToLibraryDesc: Copy the current wallpaper into the local library for sync.
themeStyle.wallpaperCopyFailed: Failed to copy wallpaper to library.
themeStyle.folderNoImages: No images found in the selected wallpaper folder.
themeStyle.syncToCloudDesc: Keeps local sync status only; cloud upload is not available yet.
themeStyle.syncRequiresLibrary: Enable copy to library before syncing.
themeStyle.folderRandomHint: Folder rotation is random by default.
themeStyle.folderRotationHint: Random mode picks images from the folder. Sequential mode rotates by filename.
themeStyle.folderSequentialMode: Folder wallpaper will rotate by filename.
themeStyle.emphasisDesc: Different emphasis for different people. Avoid using clear colors randomly.
themeStyle.coloringDesc: As the main interface to emphasize the coloring
themeStyle.highContrastDesc: Suitable for amblyopia and light sensitive contrast pattern
themeStyle.themeHelpDesc: Find help in the official Github Discussions
themeStyle.animationGroupDesc: Control CoreBox interface animations. Disable to improve performance.
themeStyle.listItemStaggerDesc: Staggered entrance animation for search result items.
themeStyle.resultTransitionDesc: Transition animation when search results change.
themeStyle.routeTransitionDesc: Controls page route transition animations (may impact performance).
themeStyle.coreBoxResizeDesc: Smooth expand/collapse animation for the search window.
themeStyle.lowBatteryModeDesc: Automatically disable animations when battery is low.

layoutSection.title: Layouts
layoutSection.tip: Choose a layout style that suits your workflow.
layoutSection.customizeCoreBoxDesc: Adjust search box logo, input style
layoutSection.atomEditorDesc: Adjust layout atoms. Changes save as Custom layout.

windowSection.title: Window Preference
windowSection.description: Select the window effect that feels comfortable to you.

About to update plugin "{name}".

This will:
• Stop the currently running plugin
• Remove old version and install new version
• Automatically re-enable after update

upgradeDialog.activeUIMessage:
Plugin "{name}" is currently in use ({ui}).

Please close the plugin window and try again.

settingDownload.groupDesc: Configure download behavior and storage options
settingDownload.autoAdjustDesc: Automatically adjust concurrent downloads based on network conditions
settingDownload.networkAwareDesc: Adapt download behavior based on network quality
settingDownload.priorityBasedDesc: Prioritize high-priority tasks over low-priority ones
settingDownload.chunkSizeDesc: Size of each download chunk for large files
settingDownload.enableResumeDesc: Support resuming interrupted downloads from where they left off
settingDownload.maxRetriesDesc: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed chunks
settingDownload.historyRetentionDesc: How long to keep download history records
settingDownload.autoCleanupDesc: Automatically clean up temporary files after downloads complete
settingDownload.timeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for network responses
settingDownload.retryDelayDesc: Wait time before retrying a failed request
settingDownload.networkMaxRetriesDesc: Maximum number of network-level retry attempts
settingDownload.actionsDesc: Manage download settings and temporary files

settingNetwork.groupDesc: Configure the CoreApp shared network proxy, retry and cooldown policy
settingNetwork.proxyModeDesc: Control whether the typed Network SDK uses system proxy, direct mode, or custom proxy
settingNetwork.bypassRulesDesc: One host rule per line, or comma-separated rules
settingNetwork.proxyAuthDesc: Credentials are read only through secure-store references. This page does not save plaintext usernames or passwords.
settingNetwork.policyGroupDesc: Configure timeout, retry, and failure cooldown for shared network requests
settingNetwork.timeoutMsDesc: Maximum wait time for a single network request
settingNetwork.maxRetriesDesc: Maximum automatic retries after a network request fails
settingNetwork.baseDelayMsDesc: Wait time before the first retry attempt
settingNetwork.maxDelayMsDesc: Longest wait time allowed by exponential backoff
settingNetwork.retryOnNetworkErrorDesc: Retry connection, DNS, and other network failures
settingNetwork.retryOnTimeoutDesc: Retry timed-out requests using the retry policy
settingNetwork.failureThresholdDesc: Consecutive failures before entering short cooldown
settingNetwork.cooldownMsDesc: Wait time after a target enters cooldown
settingNetwork.autoResetOnSuccessDesc: Clear the target failure count after a successful request
settingNetwork.actionsDesc: Save shared network configuration or restore the default policy

settingPlatformCapabilities.groupDesc: Browse built-in platform capabilities and status

settingAISDK.enableCacheDesc: Cache AI responses to reduce costs and latency

settingFileIndex.lastCheckedDesc: Last time a status check was performed

settingFileIndex.warningAlert: ⚠️ Rebuilding the file index will have the following effects:
settingFileIndex.warningSearch: • Search functionality may be temporarily impacted
settingFileIndex.warningPerformance: • The system might slow down during indexing
settingFileIndex.warningIdle: • Recommended to rebuild when the system is idle
settingFileIndex.warningBattery: • Recommended battery ≥ {min}% or plugged in{hint}, avoid below {critical}%
settingFileIndex.warningConfirm: Confirm you want to rebuild the file index? This may take several minutes.
settingFileIndex.warningBatterySimple: Recommended battery ≥ {min}% or plugged in{hint}, avoid below {critical}%
settingFileIndex.warningBatteryCritical: Battery is critically low (below {critical}%), indexing may impact battery life
settingFileIndex.alertRebuilding: Index rebuild already in progress, please wait...
settingFileIndex.alertInitPending: Index is initializing, wait for completion before rebuilding.
settingFileIndex.alertBatteryLow: Battery too low ({level}%), below {critical}% is not recommended. Confirm to proceed.
settingFileIndex.alertRebuildStarted: Index rebuild has started, please wait a moment...
settingFileIndex.policyGroupDesc: Control background indexing based on idle time and battery
settingFileIndex.idleThresholdDesc: Run background indexing only after this idle time
settingFileIndex.minBatteryDesc: Pause background indexing below this battery level (unless charging)
settingFileIndex.criticalBatteryDesc: Force pause background indexing below this battery level
settingFileIndex.allowChargingDesc: Ignore minimum battery limit while charging
settingFileIndex.forceAfterDesc: Allow skipping idle checks after this elapsed time
settingFileIndex.diagnosticCheckingDesc: Reading current idle time, battery state, and policy result.
settingFileIndex.diagnosticUnknownDesc: Current diagnostic is unavailable. Refresh and try again.
settingFileIndex.diagnosticAllowed: Current idle and battery conditions satisfy the policy. Background tasks may run.
settingFileIndex.diagnosticNotIdle: Current idle time is {idle}, below the {threshold} threshold. Background tasks will keep waiting.
settingFileIndex.diagnosticBatteryLow: Current battery is {battery}, below the {min}% minimum, and charging exemption does not apply.
settingFileIndex.diagnosticBatteryCritical: Current battery is {battery}, below the {critical}% critical floor, so execution is blocked.
settingFileIndex.deviceIdleDiagnosticLoadFailed: Failed to load idle policy diagnostic
settingFileIndex.sourceDiagnosticsGroupDesc: Inspect unified health for App, File, Everything, and other indexed sources
settingFileIndex.sourceDiagnosticsSummary: {total} sources, {ready} ready, {degraded} degraded, {unavailable} unavailable, {attention} need attention
settingFileIndex.sourceDiagnosticsLoadFailed: Failed to load search source diagnostics
settingFileIndex.sourceActionResetSuccess: Source runtime state reset: index {clearedSearchIndexRows}, progress {scanProgressRows}
settingFileIndex.providerConfigDesc: Control indexed sources that can enter root search results; browser data still requires plugin permissions and user consent
settingFileIndex.providerConfigLoadFailed: Failed to load search source config
settingFileIndex.providerConfigSaveFailed: Failed to save search source config
settingFileIndex.browserBookmarksProviderMissing: Browser Bookmarks official provider was not found
settingFileIndex.browserBookmarksSourceMissing: Browser Bookmarks indexed source was not found

setupPermissions.title: Permissions and Settings
setupPermissions.description: Complete key permissions up front so search, voice input, and file indexing do not trigger system prompts later.
setupPermissions.privacyNote: Tuff reads authorized folders locally for search, indexing, and opening files. File content is not uploaded unless you explicitly use an online AI or sync feature.
setupPermissions.fileAccessDesc: Used to build the local file index, search filenames and paths, watch file changes, and open CoreBox results.
setupPermissions.permissionCenterDesc: Manage file access, system assistive permissions, microphone access, and platform-level privileges in one place.
setupPermissions.permissionDialogDesc: Review and handle the system permissions Tuff needs here. Folder access powers local indexing; other permissions are only used by their related features.
setupPermissions.fileAccessDialogDesc: Review required folders here, then grant access once or recheck the current status.
setupPermissions.fileAccessNoRoots: No folders need to be checked yet.
setupPermissions.fileAccessPrompted: Folder access check started. If macOS shows a prompt, allow Tuff to access the listed folders.
setupPermissions.accessibilityDesc: Used to scan apps and read foreground context. Auto paste also needs macOS Automation permission for Tuff to control System Events. (Optional)
setupPermissions.microphoneDesc: Used for voice input, the voice panel, and future voice assistant features. Tuff does not record audio unless you use voice features. (Optional)
setupPermissions.adminPrivilegesDesc: Required to access system directories (e.g., C: drive) (Optional)
setupPermissions.notificationsDesc: Allow the app to display system notifications. On macOS, the granted state may need to be confirmed in System Settings. (Optional)
setupPermissions.autoStartDesc: Automatically launch app when system starts
setupPermissions.showTrayDesc: Display app icon in system tray
setupPermissions.testNotificationBody: If you can see this message, system notifications are working.
setupPermissions.testNotificationSent: Test notification sent. If you do not see it, check macOS notification settings.
setupPermissions.startupAuditMissing: Permission audit found missing setup: {permissions}. You can finish it in onboarding or Settings.
setupPermissions.requiredFileAccess: File access permission is required to continue

workflow.modelPlaceholder: Enter model instructions. Capability, input refs, and output contract are saved together
workflow.runtimeDescription: Shows the current run, pending tool approvals, and recent history.
workflow.approvalPanelDescription: high / critical tool calls pause here until they are resumed.
workflow.reviewQueueDescription: AI output enters review first and only copies or replaces clipboard after confirmation.
workflow.emptyReviewQueue: This run has no reviewable output.
workflow.emptyFilteredReviewQueue: No review items match this filter.
workflow.reviewHintPending: Pending review: copy, replace clipboard, or dismiss this output after checking it.
workflow.reviewHintCopied: Copied: the content is in the clipboard; you can still replace clipboard or dismiss this output.
workflow.reviewHintClipboardReplaced: Replaced: clipboard content was updated; dismiss this output when done.
workflow.reviewHintFailed: Action failed: retry copy, retry replace, or clear the failure to restore pending state.
workflow.reviewHintFailedWithError: Action failed: {error}. Retry copy, retry replace, or clear the failure to restore pending state.
workflow.currentRunStepsDescription: Inspect each step status and output directly.
workflow.historyDescription: Select a history record to inspect its approval state and outputs.
workflow.toastNoResumableRun: There is no run to resume
workflow.toastStillWaitingApproval: Tools are still waiting for approval
workflow.toastReviewReplaceConfirm: Click again to confirm clipboard replacement
workflow.continueOnErrorHint: When enabled, subsequent steps still run after a failed step.
workflow.agentIdPlaceholder: Select or input an agent id
workflow.resultDescription: Execution status, per-step outputs, and error details.
workflow.validationMinSteps: At least one step is required
workflow.validationInputJson: Step {index} input must be valid JSON

flow.selectTargetDesc: Choose a plugin to send data to
flow.executionConfirmationDesc: {target} requires confirmation for this action. After confirmation, {source} will send the current content immediately.
flow.authorizationAndConfirmationDesc: {target} needs permission to receive content from {source}, and this action also requires confirmation. The current content will be sent immediately after confirmation.

omniPanel.title: OmniPanel
omniPanel.emptySelection: No selected text was captured. Select text in any app, then trigger OmniPanel.
omniPanel.translateDesc: Send selected text to a translation page
omniPanel.searchDesc: Search selected text in your browser
omniPanel.coreBoxSearchDesc: Return to launcher and continue actions
omniPanel.copyDesc: Write current text back to clipboard
omniPanel.loadFailed: Failed to load OmniPanel features. Please retry later.
omniPanel.selectionUnavailable: Automatic selected-text capture is unavailable on this platform.
omniPanel.selectionCaptureFailed: Selected-text capture failed. Check permissions or desktop automation.
omniPanel.selectionRequired: This feature requires selected text before it can run.

selectionHint.empty: Select text, then choose an action.
selectionHint.unsupported: Selected-text capture is not supported here. Paste text or use clipboard input.
selectionHint.failed: Selected-text capture failed. Check desktop automation permissions, then retry.
selectionHint.disabled: Selected-text capture is disabled. Enable OmniPanel capture or paste text manually.

omniPanel.coreboxUnavailable: CoreBox is unavailable right now. Please retry shortly.
omniPanel.featureUnavailable: This feature is currently unavailable. Check plugin status.
omniPanel.aiStatusRunningDetail: Keeping the selected context attached while the provider responds.
omniPanel.aiStatusReadyDetail: Review the result and metadata before copying or replacing clipboard.
omniPanel.aiStatusFailedDetail: Review the recovery reason, then retry this writing action.
omniPanel.aiStatusConfirmingDetail: Confirm before replacing the clipboard with this AI result.

systemActions.screenshotCursorDisplaySubtitle: Capture the display under the cursor
